summary: Comprehensive backend (28 pytest cases) + frontend (Playwright) testing of GameVault MVP. All backend endpoints functional. All frontend critical flows verified including auth, catalog, add-game (manual+RAWG+scan), game detail interactions (status select, star rating onClick save, review onBlur save), journal, friends (live + dev-mode), and the new mobile menu drawer.

issues: A11y console warning: 'DialogContent requires a DialogTitle for screen reader users' and 'Missing Description or aria-describedby'. Wrap visible drawer title with VisuallyHidden or add an accessible <SheetTitle>/<SheetDescription> for accessibility compliance.

action_items: (Low/A11y) Add SheetTitle + SheetDescription (or VisuallyHidden) inside the mobile drawer SheetContent in /app/frontend/src/components/Layout.jsx to silence Radix accessibility warnings and improve screen-reader support.
critical_code_review_comments: Auth cookies use samesite='none' + secure=true which is correct for the cross-origin preview, but make sure production also serves over HTTPS or cookies will be rejected.
CORSMiddleware uses allow_origin_regex='.*' with allow_credentials=True. Functional but very permissive; consider restricting to known origins for production.
/api/files/{path:path} re-fetches object on every request without caching headers; consider Cache-Control for images.
rawg_search uses sync `requests` inside async FastAPI handlers - will block the event loop under load. Consider httpx.AsyncClient. Same for eandata and storage calls.
init_storage stores key in a module-level dict which is fine for a single worker but not thread/process-safe across workers.
test_credentials: admin@gamevault.com / admin123 (working). /app/memory/test_credentials.md is empty/missing - main agent may want to create it for future iterations.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_/UI_TEST_ prefixed games, sessions, and ephemeral users via /api/auth/register. Friend relationship established between admin and a generated test user (one-way - was not torn down).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reusable pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_gamevault.py runs end-to-end and covers all major endpoints. Note: shadcn Select (status-select on GameDetail) is a Radix combobox, NOT a native <select> - use click + role='option' instead of select_option. Dev mode auto-redirects to /dashboard on login page toggle; ProtectedRoute respects gv_dev_mode flag. Mobile drawer testid is mobile-menu-drawer; nav-* links inside auto-close drawer.
rca of the issue: No issues found. Initial Playwright failure on status select was tooling-related (used select_option on a Radix Select trigger button); fixed by switching to click-and-option pattern.
